# github-loop-runner-skill

This repository contains one portable agent skill: `github-loop-runner`.

Purpose: bootstrap or continue GitHub-only autonomous development loops. Use it when a user wants a repository seeded with `AGENTS.md`, `docs/autonomous-runner.md`, `docs/progress.md`, `docs/next-steps-plan.md`, development principles, a PR template, and CI scaffolding, or when an agent must continue milestone PRs using only the GitHub connector and CI.

Supported usage:

- Codex: native local skill under `~/.codex/skills`.
- Claude Code, Hermes Agent, OpenClaw, Goose, Cursor, Aider, Gemini CLI, and other instruction-aware agents: portable Markdown instruction/playbook. Provide `SKILL.md` plus the relevant reference files as project context, rules, memory, or skill files.

Install for Codex:

```bash
mkdir -p ~/.codex/skills
cp -R skills/github-loop-runner ~/.codex/skills/
```

Windows PowerShell:

```powershell
New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force "$env:USERPROFILE\.codex\skills" | Out-Null
Copy-Item -Recurse -Force ".\skills\github-loop-runner" "$env:USERPROFILE\.codex\skills\github-loop-runner"
```

Invoke:

```text
Use $github-loop-runner to turn this product idea into a GitHub repo with autonomous runner docs, progress tracking, and milestone PR loops.
```

Portable invocation:

```text
Use the GitHub Loop Runner skill at skills/github-loop-runner/SKILL.md.
If bootstrapping a repo, also load skills/github-loop-runner/references/repo-scaffold.md.
If producing the final runner prompt, also load skills/github-loop-runner/references/runner-prompt.md.
```

Important files:

- `skills/github-loop-runner/SKILL.md`: core GitHub-only bootstrap and loop workflow.
- `skills/github-loop-runner/references/repo-scaffold.md`: repository seed file templates.
- `skills/github-loop-runner/references/runner-prompt.md`: copy-paste autonomous runner prompt.
- `skills/github-loop-runner/agents/openai.yaml`: Codex UI metadata and GitHub dependency.
- `agent-prompts/README.md`: index for agent handoff prompts in this repository.
- `agent-prompts/harness-upgrade-plan.md`: milestone plan for adding Loop Trace, Harness Repair Loop, hypothesis-gated renewal, and harness-layer root cause classification.
- `agent-prompts/start-harness-upgrade.md`: copy-paste prompt for another agent to read the repository and start the upgrade.
- `scripts/validate_skill.py`: local/CI validator.

Integrity rule: the runner must re-read `docs/progress.md` after each completed milestone, use CI for verification in GitHub-only mode, and never weaken tests, evals, assertions, or acceptance criteria to get green.

Agent upgrade rule: when improving this skill, start from `agent-prompts/start-harness-upgrade.md`, then follow `agent-prompts/harness-upgrade-plan.md` in small validated milestones. Treat `agent-prompts/` as temporary development scaffolding; after the upgrade is encoded in the skill and reference files, it may be removed with its validator/index references.
